CancelJob.name: CancelJob
CancelJob.description: Grants permission to cancel a job in an AWS Batch job queue in your account

CreateComputeEnvironment.name: CreateComputeEnvironment
CreateComputeEnvironment.description: Grants permission to create an AWS Batch compute environment in your account

CreateConsumableResource.name: CreateConsumableResource
CreateConsumableResource.description: Grants permission to create an AWS Batch consumable resource in your account

CreateJobQueue.name: CreateJobQueue
CreateJobQueue.description: Grants permission to create an AWS Batch job queue in your account

CreateQuotaShare.name: CreateQuotaShare
CreateQuotaShare.description: Grants permission to create an AWS Batch quota share in your account

CreateSchedulingPolicy.name: CreateSchedulingPolicy
CreateSchedulingPolicy.description: Grants permission to create an AWS Batch scheduling policy in your account

CreateServiceEnvironment.name: CreateServiceEnvironment
CreateServiceEnvironment.description: Grants permission to create an AWS Batch service environment in your account

DeleteComputeEnvironment.name: DeleteComputeEnvironment
DeleteComputeEnvironment.description: Grants permission to delete an AWS Batch compute environment in your account

DeleteConsumableResource.name: DeleteConsumableResource
DeleteConsumableResource.description: Grants permission to delete an AWS Batch consumable resource in your account

DeleteJobQueue.name: DeleteJobQueue
DeleteJobQueue.description: Grants permission to delete an AWS Batch job queue in your account

DeleteQuotaShare.name: DeleteQuotaShare
DeleteQuotaShare.description: Grants permission to delete an AWS Batch quota share in your account

DeleteSchedulingPolicy.name: DeleteSchedulingPolicy
DeleteSchedulingPolicy.description: Grants permission to delete an AWS Batch scheduling policy in your account

DeleteServiceEnvironment.name: DeleteServiceEnvironment
DeleteServiceEnvironment.description: Grants permission to delete an AWS Batch service environment in your account

DeregisterJobDefinition.name: DeregisterJobDefinition
DeregisterJobDefinition.description: Grants permission to deregister an AWS Batch job definition in your account

DescribeComputeEnvironments.name: DescribeComputeEnvironments
DescribeComputeEnvironments.description: Grants permission to describe one or more AWS Batch compute environments in your account

DescribeConsumableResource.name: DescribeConsumableResource
DescribeConsumableResource.description: Grants permission to describe one or more AWS Batch consumable resource in your account

DescribeJobDefinitions.name: DescribeJobDefinitions
DescribeJobDefinitions.description: Grants permission to describe one or more AWS Batch job definitions in your account

DescribeJobQueues.name: DescribeJobQueues
DescribeJobQueues.description: Grants permission to describe one or more AWS Batch job queues in your account

DescribeJobs.name: DescribeJobs
DescribeJobs.description: Grants permission to describe a list of AWS Batch jobs in your account

DescribeQuotaShare.name: DescribeQuotaShare
DescribeQuotaShare.description: Grants permission to describe an AWS Batch quota share in your account

DescribeSchedulingPolicies.name: DescribeSchedulingPolicies
DescribeSchedulingPolicies.description: Grants permission to describe one or more AWS Batch scheduling policies in your account

DescribeServiceEnvironments.name: DescribeServiceEnvironments
DescribeServiceEnvironments.description: Grants permission to describe one or more AWS Batch service environments in your account

DescribeServiceJob.name: DescribeServiceJob
DescribeServiceJob.description: Grants permission to describe a AWS Batch service job in your account

GetJobQueueSnapshot.name: GetJobQueueSnapshot
GetJobQueueSnapshot.description: Grants permission to get a snapshot of an AWS Batch job queue in your account

ListConsumableResources.name: ListConsumableResources
ListConsumableResources.description: Grants permission to list AWS Batch consumable resources in your account

ListJobs.name: ListJobs
ListJobs.description: Grants permission to list jobs for a specified AWS Batch job queue in your account

ListJobsByConsumableResource.name: ListJobsByConsumableResource
ListJobsByConsumableResource.description: Grants permission to list AWS Batch jobs that require a specific consumable resource in your account

ListQuotaShares.name: ListQuotaShares
ListQuotaShares.description: Grants permission to list AWS Batch quota shares in your account

ListSchedulingPolicies.name: ListSchedulingPolicies
ListSchedulingPolicies.description: Grants permission to list AWS Batch scheduling policies in your account

ListServiceJobs.name: ListServiceJobs
ListServiceJobs.description: Grants permission to list service jobs for a specified AWS Batch job queue in your account

ListTagsForResource.name: ListTagsForResource
ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for an AWS Batch resource in your account

RegisterJobDefinition.name: RegisterJobDefinition
RegisterJobDefinition.description: Grants permission to register an AWS Batch job definition in your account

SubmitJob.name: SubmitJob
SubmitJob.description: Grants permission to submit an AWS Batch job from a job definition in your account

SubmitServiceJob.name: SubmitServiceJob
SubmitServiceJob.description: Grants permission to submit an AWS Batch service job

TagResource.name: TagResource
TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag an AWS Batch resource in your account

TerminateJob.name: TerminateJob
TerminateJob.description: Grants permission to terminate a job in an AWS Batch job queue in your account

TerminateServiceJob.name: TerminateServiceJob
TerminateServiceJob.description: Grants permission to terminate a service job in an AWS Batch job queue in your account

UntagResource.name: UntagResource
UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag an AWS Batch resource in your account

UpdateComputeEnvironment.name: UpdateComputeEnvironment
UpdateComputeEnvironment.description: Grants permission to update an AWS Batch compute environment in your account

UpdateConsumableResource.name: UpdateConsumableResource
UpdateConsumableResource.description: Grants permission to update an AWS Batch consumable resource in your account

UpdateJobQueue.name: UpdateJobQueue
UpdateJobQueue.description: Grants permission to update an AWS Batch job queue in your account

UpdateQuotaShare.name: UpdateQuotaShare
UpdateQuotaShare.description: Grants permission to update an AWS Batch quota share in your account

UpdateSchedulingPolicy.name: UpdateSchedulingPolicy
UpdateSchedulingPolicy.description: Grants permission to update an AWS Batch scheduling policy in your account

UpdateServiceEnvironment.name: UpdateServiceEnvironment
UpdateServiceEnvironment.description: Grants permission to update an AWS Batch service environment in your account

UpdateServiceJob.name: UpdateServiceJob
UpdateServiceJob.description: Grants permission to update a service job in an AWS Batch job queue in your account

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.name: aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}
aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.name: aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}
aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.name: aws:TagKeys
aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request

batch:AWSLogsCreateGroup.name: batch:AWSLogsCreateGroup
batch:AWSLogsCreateGroup.description: Filters access by the specified logging driver to determine whether awslogs group will be created for the logs

batch:AWSLogsGroup.name: batch:AWSLogsGroup
batch:AWSLogsGroup.description: Filters access by the awslogs group where the logs are located

batch:AWSLogsRegion.name: batch:AWSLogsRegion
batch:AWSLogsRegion.description: Filters access by the region where the logs are sent to

batch:AWSLogsStreamPrefix.name: batch:AWSLogsStreamPrefix
batch:AWSLogsStreamPrefix.description: Filters access by the awslogs log stream prefix

batch:EKSImage.name: batch:EKSImage
batch:EKSImage.description: Filters access by the image used to start a container for an Amazon EKS job

batch:EKSNamespace.name: batch:EKSNamespace
batch:EKSNamespace.description: Filters access by the namespace of a cluster used to run the pod for an Amazon EKS job

batch:EKSPrivileged.name: batch:EKSPrivileged
batch:EKSPrivileged.description: Filters access by the specified privileged parameter value that determines whether the container is given elevated privileges on the host container instance (similar to the root user) for an Amazon EKS job

batch:EKSRunAsGroup.name: batch:EKSRunAsGroup
batch:EKSRunAsGroup.description: Filters access by the specified group numeric ID (gid) used to start a container in an Amazon EKS job

batch:EKSRunAsUser.name: batch:EKSRunAsUser
batch:EKSRunAsUser.description: Filters access by the specified user numeric ID (uid) used to start a a container in an Amazon EKS job

batch:EKSServiceAccountName.name: batch:EKSServiceAccountName
batch:EKSServiceAccountName.description: Filters access by the name of the service account used to run the pod for an Amazon EKS job

batch:Image.name: batch:Image
batch:Image.description: Filters access by the image used to start a container

batch:LogDriver.name: batch:LogDriver
batch:LogDriver.description: Filters access by the log driver used for the container

batch:Privileged.name: batch:Privileged
batch:Privileged.description: Filters access by the specified privileged parameter value that determines whether the container is given elevated privileges on the host container instance (similar to the root user)

batch:SchedulingPriority.name: batch:SchedulingPriority
batch:SchedulingPriority.description: Filters access by the scheduling priority for jobs in the job queue

batch:ShareIdentifier.name: batch:ShareIdentifier
batch:ShareIdentifier.description: Filters access by the shareIdentifier used inside submit job

batch:User.name: batch:User
batch:User.description: Filters access by user name or numeric uid used inside the container
